components.name: TimelineCanvas
components.description: React component that renders a Timeline instance onto an HTML canvas element. Initializes the timeline on mount and destroys it on unmount. The canvas fills its parent container at 100% width and height, has position:relative applied inline, and sets tabIndex={0} to enable keyboard focus.

props.name: timeline
props.description: A Timeline instance to render on the canvas. The component calls timeline.init() on mount and timeline.destroy() on unmount.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class name applied to the canvas element.

hooks.name: useTimeline
hooks.description: Creates and memoizes a Timeline instance from the given configuration. Returns the timeline instance, its API, and start/stop helpers for manual canvas management: start(canvas) calls timeline.init(canvas) to attach the timeline to a canvas element, and stop() calls timeline.destroy() to detach it.
hooks.signature: useTimeline<TEvent extends TimelineEvent, TMarker extends TimelineMarker = TimelineMarker, TSection extends TimelineSection = TimelineSection>(config: TimeLineConfig<TEvent, TMarker, TSection>) => { timeline: Timeline<TEvent, TMarker, TSection>; api: CanvasApi; start: (canvas: HTMLCanvasElement) => void; stop: () => void }

parameters.name: config
parameters.description: Configuration object containing settings (start, end, axes, events, markers, sections) and optional viewConfiguration for ruler, grid, axes, sections, events, markers, and camera options.

hooks.return_type: { timeline: Timeline<TEvent, TMarker, TSection>; api: CanvasApi; start: (canvas: HTMLCanvasElement) => void; stop: () => void }

hooks.name: useTimelineEvent
hooks.description: Subscribes to a specific event on a Timeline instance. Attaches the listener on mount via timeline.on() and removes it on unmount via timeline.off(). Uses useLayoutEffect for synchronous subscription.
hooks.signature: useTimelineEvent<Event extends keyof ApiEvent, TEvent extends TimelineEvent = TimelineEvent, TMarker extends TimelineMarker = TimelineMarker, TSection extends TimelineSection = TimelineSection>(timeline: Timeline<TEvent, TMarker, TSection> | null, event: Event, cb: (data: UnwrapTimelineEventsDetail<Event, TEvent, TMarker, TSection>, event: UnwrapTimelineEvents<Event, TEvent, TMarker, TSection>) => void) => void

parameters.name: timeline
parameters.description: The Timeline instance to subscribe to, or null to skip subscription.

parameters.name: event
parameters.description: The event name to listen for on the timeline.

parameters.name: cb
parameters.type: (data: UnwrapTimelineEventsDetail<Event, TEvent, TMarker, TSection>, event: UnwrapTimelineEvents<Event, TEvent, TMarker, TSection>) => void
parameters.description: Callback invoked with the event detail data and the full event object when the specified event fires.
